company_context: Home - RackN RackN Menu Read case studies Schedule a demo Read case studies Schedule a demo Menu Home High speed and large scale bare metal automation Improve operational efficiency tenfold with reliable, end-to-end workflows, even in multi-vendor and air-gapped environments. Read case studies Schedule a demo The Digital Rebar Platform Digital Rebar, developed by RackN, automates bare metal infrastructure through Day 0, 1, and 2. It replaces manual processes with a standardized system, improving efficiency, reliability, and security. High Speed Large Scale Full Choice Change Ready Reset entire racks in under an hour. Digital Rebar enables zero-touch onboarding from the moment hardware is plugged in, freeing you from individually bringing up systems. Infrastructure becomes self-verifying and instantly usable, letting you rapidly move from trials and proof-of-concepts to production. Learn More Most infrastructure doesn’t scale well because it’s fragile and inconsistent. Digital Rebar provides automated, repeatable workflows that support multi-site and multi-vendor environments. With our versioned and customizable IaC workflows, you can scale up without scaling headcount to match. Digital Rebar standardizes your provisioning pipeline, allowing you to deploy any OS, hypervisor, or platform across any hardware. Run mixed environments, like Intel and AMD, VMware and OpenShift Virtualization, Ubuntu and RHEL, without reinventing your existing processes. VMware licensing changes? New security baseline? Zero-touch rebuilds? Digital Rebar is built to handle these changes efficiently. Our modular architecture and dev|test|prod staging pipelines allow you to validate and roll out changes without causing issues in production or relying on manual patching. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data workflows and improve operational efficiency. How are you today?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm doing well, thanks. What makes you think we need a data processing solution? We've already invested in a few tools to manage our infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's great to hear. However, I'd like to ask, are you experiencing any bottlenecks or inefficiencies in your current setup? Our solution has been able to help companies reduce their data processing time by up to 50%.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Honestly, we've been pretty happy with our current solution. It's been working for us, and we've already sunk a significant amount of money into it. I'm not sure we're looking to switch anytime soon. Plus, I'd be concerned about the integration costs and potential downtime.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns. Our solution is designed to be highly adaptable and can integrate with a wide range of existing systems. We've also had success with companies in similar situations, where we've been able to integrate our solution with minimal disruption. As for cost, I'd be happy to discuss pricing and see if we can find a solution that fits your budget.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your willingness to work with us, but I'm still not convinced. We're in the middle of a major project rollout, and I don't think this is the right time to be evaluating new solutions. Plus, I've heard that your competitor, DataFlex, has a similar solution that's priced more competitively.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your timing concerns, and I can definitely see how that would be a priority. Regarding DataFlex, we've actually had companies switch to us from them due to our more comprehensive feature set and better support. I'd be happy to provide some case studies and references if you're interested.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate the offer, but I think we're going to have to pass on this for now. We're happy with our current solution, and I don't see a compelling reason to switch. I appreciate your time, but I think we'll stick with what we have.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand, and I appreciate your honesty. If you ever find yourself re-evaluating your data processing needs, please don't hesitate to reach out.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Thank you, Alex, but I think we're all set. We'll stick with our current solution and see how it continues to work for us.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concerns about integration costs and downtime earlier in the conversation to potentially overcome the objection. Sentiment: Neutral
